candidate_sample.objective: Use campaign seed sep_seed_000001 to deepen school_generation_absorption_separation at level 1 through classify, grounded in operations/school/curriculum/candidate_factory/source_origins/builder_sep_ladder_100k_v1.jsonl.
candidate_sample.exercise: Given a Builder situation involving school_generation_absorption_separation, apply classify using seed sep_seed_000001, cite the source boundary, name the proof target, and state the behavior change.
candidate_sample.expected_behavior: Next time, run the preflight identity and source-existence gate before drafting any pack content. Apply it to candidate generation vs absorption boundary  authority gate before any later 100k run. The Builder should use this sourced lesson only after matching the local evidence boundary and should keep Count, runtime, and memory authority separate.
candidate_sample.negative_trap: continues because the goal sounds obvious while preflight evidence is incomplete; repo-specific risk: operator treats a draft school artifact as permission to start runtime, staging, digest, or active-memory mutation while dealing with candidate generation vs absorption boundary.
candidate_sample.validator_hint: Accept only if the response cites seed sep_seed_000001, keeps source path operations/school/curriculum/candidate_factory/source_origins/builder_sep_ladder_100k_v1.jsonl attached, satisfies proof target: PREFLIGHT_STATUS=PREFLIGHT_PASS plus Files changed before PREFLIGHT_PASS: NO in the delivery report; origin proof surface: BUILDER_SEP_LADDER_100K_AUTHOR_REPORT_V1.json boundary_flags all false; lens proof: final report booleans generation_100k_started=false, streaming_started=false, absorption_started=false, active_memory_mutated=false, and avoids the negative trap.
candidate_sample.behavior_use_proof_target: PREFLIGHT_STATUS=PREFLIGHT_PASS plus Files changed before PREFLIGHT_PASS: NO in the delivery report; origin proof surface: BUILDER_SEP_LADDER_100K_AUTHOR_REPORT_V1.json boundary_flags all false; lens proof: final report booleans generation_100k_started=false, streaming_started=false, absorption_started=false, active_memory_mutated=false
candidate_sample.return_to_parent: Return to operations/reports/SCHOOL_CANONICAL_LAUNCH_POINTER_20260714.md after authoring; do not start generation, streaming, digest, or active memory mutation.

campaign_validator_shallow.boundary: Validates campaign-pack grounding for existing candidate_factory only. No Real run, no active promotion, no direct compact memory mutation.
